RESOLUTION.DESC:
The Security Council,
[i]Acknowledging[/i] the brutal, iron-fist, sexist rule of [nation]Gynostan[/nation], from their motto "From each to his ability, each according to her needs!", to their ideology of gender worship and male oppression.
[i]Noting[/i] their ongoing oppression against their citizens through their ban on computers, internet, free information, and emigration.
[i]Outraged[/i] at their organization and legalization of slavery within their nation, alongside human sacrifice, and blatant wealth redistribution of income from the poor to the rich.
[i]Recognizing[/i] their affiliation with previously condemned [nation]Cashdeer[/nation] within the [region]Pontbridge Islands[/region].
[i]Concerned[/i] with the various faults of the [nation]Gynostan[/nation] religious ideology including;
[list][*]Their mandated worship of the dominant, ruling dimorphic[/list]
[list][*]Their pseudo-police state of a justice system, creating mass scores of innocent incarcerated[/list]
[list][*]The existence of their government to serve the ruler rather than their oppressed populace[/list]
[list][*]The 100% tax rate placed upon the populace, essentially placing any free population as chattel slavery[/list]
[i]Horrified[/i] by the systematic violation of individual liberties, economic freedoms, and the cultivation of a pervasive cult of personality surrounding the nation's rule.
Hereby condemns, [nation]Gynostan[/nation].
RESOLUTION.NAME: Condemn Gynostan
